protocols.name: Spark
protocols.summary: Sky ecosystem lending and savings protocol.
protocols.notes: Includes SparkLend and sUSDS as requested by the RFP.
protocols.ethereumScope: Ethereum mainnet Spark markets and Sky savings products.

protocols.name: Aave
protocols.summary: Multi-market liquidity protocol for overcollateralized borrowing.
protocols.notes: Includes v3 and v4 scope where public governance and risk feeds are available.
protocols.ethereumScope: Ethereum mainnet Aave deployments and governance-controlled markets.

protocols.name: Morpho
protocols.summary: Lending protocol with isolated markets and vault-based risk allocation.
protocols.notes: Core lending protocol. Morpho Vaults are tracked separately under Yield.
protocols.ethereumScope: Ethereum mainnet Morpho Blue markets.

protocols.name: Fluid
protocols.summary: Lending and DEX hybrid built around shared liquidity.
protocols.notes: Tracks lending, vault, and DEX-adjacent risk where providers separate them.
protocols.ethereumScope: Ethereum mainnet Fluid protocol.

protocols.name: Gearbox
protocols.summary: Credit-account leverage protocol for composable DeFi positions.
protocols.notes: Tracks protocol-level risk and supported credit markets.
protocols.ethereumScope: Ethereum mainnet Gearbox credit accounts and pools.

protocols.name: Euler
protocols.summary: Modular vault lending protocol.
protocols.notes: Tracks Euler vaults and governance-controlled modules.
protocols.ethereumScope: Ethereum mainnet Euler vault ecosystem.

protocols.name: Compound
protocols.summary: Money market protocol with governance-managed risk parameters.
protocols.notes: Includes v2 and v3.
protocols.ethereumScope: Ethereum mainnet Compound deployments.

protocols.name: Liquity
protocols.summary: Immutable collateralized debt protocol.
protocols.notes: Includes v1 and v2 where feed providers distinguish versions.
protocols.ethereumScope: Ethereum mainnet Liquity deployments.

protocols.name: Uniswap
protocols.summary: Automated market maker and intent-based exchange infrastructure.
protocols.notes: Includes v3, v4, and UniswapX.
protocols.ethereumScope: Ethereum mainnet Uniswap liquidity and routing.

protocols.name: Curve
protocols.summary: Stablecoin, LST, and correlated-asset AMM infrastructure.
protocols.notes: Tracks protocol-level pools and governance risk.
protocols.ethereumScope: Ethereum mainnet Curve pools and DAO governance.

protocols.name: Balancer
protocols.summary: Weighted and stable pool AMM infrastructure.
protocols.notes: Tracks Ethereum mainnet pool and governance risk.
protocols.ethereumScope: Ethereum mainnet Balancer pools and governance.

protocols.name: CoW Swap
protocols.summary: Intent-based DEX protocol with solver competition and MEV protection.
protocols.notes: Swap aggregator with no pooled liquidity; volume metric is the relevant capital-at-risk measure.
protocols.ethereumScope: Ethereum mainnet settlement and solver ecosystem.

protocols.name: 1inch
protocols.summary: DEX aggregation and limit order protocol.
protocols.notes: DEX aggregator with routed liquidity; volume metric is the relevant capital-at-risk measure.
protocols.ethereumScope: Ethereum mainnet 1inch aggregation and order flow.

protocols.name: 0x / Matcha
protocols.summary: 0x protocol and Matcha exchange frontend.
protocols.notes: Swap aggregator with no pooled liquidity; volume metric is the relevant capital-at-risk measure.
protocols.ethereumScope: Ethereum mainnet 0x liquidity and Matcha routing.

protocols.name: Yearn Finance
protocols.summary: Automated yield vault protocol.
protocols.notes: Tracks Ethereum mainnet vault strategy and governance risk.
protocols.ethereumScope: Ethereum mainnet Yearn vaults.

protocols.name: Mellow
protocols.summary: Modular LRT vault infrastructure.
protocols.notes: Tracks Ethereum vault and restaking-adjacent risk where available.
protocols.ethereumScope: Ethereum mainnet Mellow vaults.

protocols.name: Morpho Vaults
protocols.summary: Curated MetaMorpho vaults.
protocols.notes: Tracked separately from the core Morpho lending protocol.
protocols.ethereumScope: Ethereum mainnet MetaMorpho vaults and curator-managed allocations.

protocols.name: Pendle
protocols.summary: Yield tokenization and fixed-rate trading protocol.
protocols.notes: Tracks Ethereum mainnet yield markets.
protocols.ethereumScope: Ethereum mainnet Pendle markets.

protocols.name: Lido
protocols.summary: ETH liquid staking protocol and stETH issuer.
protocols.notes: stETH is a major DeFi collateral and yield source.
protocols.ethereumScope: Ethereum mainnet Lido staking and stETH governance.

protocols.name: Rocket Pool
protocols.summary: Decentralized ETH staking protocol and rETH issuer.
protocols.notes: Tracks rETH and Ethereum node operator governance risk.
protocols.ethereumScope: Ethereum mainnet Rocket Pool staking and rETH.

feeds.name: DeFiScan
feeds.focus: Decentralization maturity: who controls keys, upgrades, and admin powers.
feeds.methodology: Stage-based centralization reviews backed by contract and control-surface analysis.
feeds.independenceNote: Non-profit DeFi Collective project with open, community-reviewable methodology.

feeds.name: LlamaRisk
feeds.focus: Protocol research, collateral assessments, market health, and parameter recommendations.
feeds.methodology: Provider-authored risk research and active risk-service mandates.
feeds.independenceNote: Holds paid risk mandates and operates vault strategies in markets it researches.

feeds.name: BlockAnalitica
feeds.focus: Quantitative onchain lending risk dashboards covering liquidations, collateral health, and exposure.
feeds.methodology: Market-level monitoring and risk analytics, including the Sphere product.
feeds.independenceNote: Also curates lending vaults in markets covered by its analytics.

feeds.name: CuratorWatch
feeds.focus: Vault-level monitoring for Morpho curators, allocations, and curator behavior.
feeds.methodology: Curator and vault requirements, allocation monitoring, and comparative grades.
feeds.independenceNote: Independent watchdog that does not curate the vaults it monitors.

feeds.name: DeFiPunk'd
feeds.focus: Control, exit, autonomy, open access, and verifiability assessed through distributed model consensus.
feeds.methodology: Dimension-based provider ratings; ungraded protocol pages remain partial coverage.
feeds.independenceNote: No protocol mandates or capital-allocation activity are publicly disclosed.

feeds.name: Credora
feeds.focus: Institutional credit-risk ratings for protocols, borrowers, and rated vault exposures.
feeds.methodology: Credit ratings distributed through reports, APIs, and attestations.
feeds.independenceNote: Commercial ratings are distributed into protocol and vault integrations.

feeds.name: Xerberus
feeds.focus: Mechanism-level risk ratings for protocols, assets, pools, and vaults.
feeds.methodology: Composite provider ratings built from security, economics, governance, receipt-token, and cross-chain domains.
feeds.independenceNote: Commercial provider that publicly states it does not accept payment from rated issuers.

feeds.name: Philidor Analytics
feeds.focus: Deterministic vault ratings across asset quality, code maturity, and governance controls.
feeds.methodology: Open deterministic framework exposed through public analytics and developer interfaces.
feeds.independenceNote: For-profit analytics provider that does not curate rated vaults.

feeds.name: pigi.finance
feeds.focus: Vault analytics, historical exploits, concentration, and risk-adjusted yield comparisons.
feeds.methodology: Strategy and vault comparison data across lending, LP, and yield products.
feeds.independenceNote: Commercial analytics vendor without disclosed vault curation.

feeds.name: DeFi Saver
feeds.focus: Position-management tooling with loan-health, safety-ratio, and liquidation-protection monitoring.
feeds.methodology: Coverage means supported protocol positions and risk-relevant management tooling, not a provider rating.
feeds.independenceNote: Commercial execution tooling; revenue is linked to usage rather than ratings.

feeds.name: Zyfai Risk
feeds.focus: Live pool risk metrics, TVL, APY, and security grades.
feeds.methodology: Pool-level grades and real-time risk analytics for whitelisted DeFi strategies.
feeds.independenceNote: The associated yield agent deploys user capital into protocols covered by the dashboard.

feeds.name: Anticapture
feeds.focus: DAO capture risk, voting-power concentration, cost-to-attack, and governance monitoring.
feeds.methodology: Stage-based governance security framework with open-source analysis.
feeds.independenceNote: Built by a commercial governance service provider working with assessed DAOs.

feeds.name: Exponential DeFi
feeds.focus: A-F pool ratings decomposed into protocol, asset, chain, and pool risk.
feeds.methodology: Pre-migration Exponential ratings retained as reference samples after the product moved into YO.
feeds.independenceNote: Investment platform that allocated user capital into pools it rated.

feeds.name: DeFi Safety
feeds.focus: Process Quality Reviews covering documentation, testing, audits, and admin-key practices.
feeds.methodology: Standardized 0-100 process-quality review framework.
feeds.independenceNote: Independent public-good reviewer that does not deploy capital into reviewed protocols.

feeds.name: Gauntlet
feeds.focus: Agent-based economic simulation, parameter optimization, and insolvency prevention.
feeds.methodology: Mandate-based market risk research, monitoring, and parameter recommendations.
feeds.independenceNote: Receives paid mandates from protocols and DAOs it assesses.

feeds.name: Chaos Labs
feeds.focus: Economic risk dashboards, stress simulation, and parameter automation for lending markets.
feeds.methodology: Protocol-specific risk mandates, monitoring hubs, and automated parameter recommendations.
feeds.independenceNote: Receives paid mandates from protocols and DAOs it assesses.

incidents.title: CRV short squeeze / bad debt — $1.6M
incidents.summary: A trader borrowed ~92M CRV against USDC on Aave V2 attempting a short squeeze. The liquidation left ~$1.6M of CRV bad debt under thin liquidity. Core contracts were not exploited; the Aave DAO subsequently cleared the deficit.

incidents.title: Kelp rsETH bridge exploit — collateral exposure ~$196M
incidents.summary: After ~$292M of unbacked rsETH was minted via a Kelp DAO bridge exploit, the Aave Guardian froze rsETH and wrsETH markets within the hour. Aave carried the largest exposure (~$196M) and launched the DeFi United recovery initiative on Apr 23.
